question: Return a table of zip-code loyalty metrics for zip codes with at least 50 ordering customers, with columns zip, ordering_customers, repeat_customers, repeat_customer_rate_pct, and avg_orders_per_customer.
sql_query:
WITH customer_orders AS (
    SELECT c.zip_code,
           c.customer_id,
           COUNT(o.order_id) AS order_count
    FROM core.customers AS c
    JOIN core.orders AS o ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
    GROUP BY c.zip_code, c.customer_id
)
SELECT cu.zip_code AS zip,
       COUNT(cu.customer_id) AS ordering_customers,
       COUNT(CASE WHEN cu.order_count >= 2 THEN 1 END) AS repeat_customers,
       ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN cu.order_count >= 2 THEN 1 END) / COUNT(cu.customer_id), 2) AS repeat_customer_rate_pct,
       ROUND(AVG(cu.order_count), 2) AS avg_orders_per_customer
FROM customer_orders AS cu
GROUP BY cu.zip_code
HAVING COUNT(cu.customer_id) >= 50
ORDER BY cu.zip_code
pandas_sql_query: WITH zip_customer_orders AS (SELECT zip, customer_id, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders GROUP BY 1, 2) SELECT zip, COUNT(*) AS ordering_customers, SUM(CASE WHEN order_count > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS repeat_customers, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN order_count > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 4) AS repeat_customer_rate_pct, ROUND(AVG(order_count), 4) AS avg_orders_per_customer FROM zip_customer_orders GROUP BY 1 HAVING COUNT(*) >= 50 ORDER BY repeat_customer_rate_pct DESC, zip LIMIT 20
